## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] Local run completed
- [ ] API behavior checked (if applicable)
- [ ] Firmware behavior checked (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Notes for Reviewers

Add context for testing, risks, or migration concerns.
